title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCII. Games.
content:
[Used in Somersetshire in counting out the game of pee-wip or pee wit.]

        One-ery, two-ery, hickary, hum,
        Fillison, follison, Nicholson, John,
        Quever, quauver, Irish Mary,
        Stenkarum, stankarum, buck!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCII. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
